recommendations.title: The Super
recommendations.overview: A man becomes the superintendent of a large New York City apartment building where people mysteriously go missing.

recommendations.title: Girl on the Third Floor
recommendations.overview: Don Koch tries to renovate a rundown mansion with a sordid history for his growing family, only to learn that the house has other plans.

recommendations.title: Ghost Mansion
recommendations.overview: A horror webtoon writer journeys to a shabby apartment building in search of ideas. The building's caretaker tells him about multiple strange events that happened throughout the building's history.

recommendations.title: Shivers
recommendations.overview: The residents of a suburban high-rise apartment building are infected by parasites that turn them into mindless nymphomaniac fiends.

recommendations.title: Blackout
recommendations.overview: Three people from different walks of life find themselves trapped inside a stalled elevator. What at first seems like an inconvenience rapidly escalates into a nightmare.

recommendations.title: Dark Water
recommendations.overview: A woman in the midst of an unpleasant divorce moves to an eerie apartment building with her young daughter. The ceiling of their apartment has a dark and active leak.

recommendations.title: The Dreamlife of Angels
recommendations.overview: Isa and Marie bond while working in a French sweatshop and soon begin sharing an apartment that Marie is watching for a hospitalized mother and daughter. Marie, hoping to avoid a life of struggle and poverty, takes up with Chriss, a nightclub owner w

recommendations.title: Late Phases
recommendations.overview: When deadly attacks from a nearby forest beset a secluded retirement community, it is up to a blind army veteran to discover what the residents are hiding.

recommendations.title: The Birds
recommendations.overview: Thousands of birds flock into a seaside town and terrorize the residents in a series of deadly attacks.

recommendations.title: Population 436
recommendations.overview: A census-taker is sent to investigate why a certain small town has had the same population -- 436 residents -- for the last 100 years.
